content: calculate the Scheduled ER Amount as a percentage of the Annual Salary

To calculate the Scheduled ER Amount as a percentage of the Annual Salary, I will divide the Scheduled ER Amount by the Annual Salary and then multiply by 100.

I noticed some employees have a blank Annual Salary, so the expression includes a check to avoid errors for those rows.

```
If(AnnualSalary=="" || Value(AnnualSalary)==0, 0, Multiply(Divide(Value(ScheduledERAmount), Value(AnnualSalary)), 100))
```
This expression will produce a **Numeric** output.

Suggested column name: **ER as Percent of Salary**

{{SUGGESTED_ACTIONS:Create new column|Test with my data|Explain this expression}}
